codeReview.summary: The confidence-gated golden sample validation method was implemented (commit 7ac4373), adding AutoApplicationEligibility checking with confidence >0.9 threshold and golden sample validation. However, the validate_procedure_for_auto_application method is not wired into any caller - the feature description says to 'wire golden_sample_testing.rs to validate learned procedures' but there's no integration with the orchestrator, learning pipeline, or post_session_learning to actually call this method. The implementation itself is well-structured with 47 passing tests, but it remains unused.

issues.description: validate_procedure_for_auto_application method is implemented but never called from any external component. The feature description requires 'wiring golden_sample_testing.rs to validate learned procedures' but there's no evidence of this wiring in the orchestrator, learning_pipeline.rs, post_session_learning.rs, or any other component that would invoke this validation before auto-application.

Post-session learning has its own validation mechanism (LearnedPattern::validate) that doesn't integrate with GoldenSampleService::validate_procedure_for_auto_application. The two validation systems appear disconnected.

No references to GoldenSampleService, AutoApplicationEligibility, or validate_procedure_for_auto_application found in the orchestrator. The orchestrator should be calling this validation before allowing auto-application of procedures.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The golden sample testing module defines validate_procedure_for_auto_application which should gate auto-application of learned procedures, but this gate is not actually enforced anywhere in the codebase. This was discovered by grep searching for uses of GoldenSampleService and finding only self-use in tests.

The feature ID 'mem-golden-sample-validation' specified in the task does not exist in features.json. The closest feature ID is 'mem-golden-sample-testing'. This mismatch between task description and actual feature ID may indicate a naming or tracking issue in the mission setup.

summary: Feature implementation is incomplete - while the validate_procedure_for_auto_application method is correctly implemented and well-tested (47 tests pass), it is not wired into any caller. The feature requires wiring golden_sample_testing.rs to validate learned procedures before auto-application, but no integration points exist. The method sits unused in the swell-memory crate. Cargo check and clippy pass. The implementation needs to be wired into the orchestrator or learning pipeline to fulfill the feature requirement.
